mapper.select: SELECT CRTR_YR , DATA_CD, APLCN_PTM_CD, DATA_SE_CD, APLCN_UNTPRC FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = #{year} AND DATA_CD = '1'

WITH UP_TBL AS ( SELECT S.*, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE #{from_year} <= CRTR_YR AND CRTR_YR <= #{to_year} ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD ) SELECT (H.YYYY || '-' || H.MM || '-' || H.DD || ' ' || H.HH || ':00:00') AS DATA_DT, H.YYYY, H.MM, H.DD, H.HH, H.LAST_VALUE, U.APLCN_UNTPRC, ROUND(H.LAST_VALUE * U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 2) AS TOT_PRC FROM ( SELECT YYYY, CASE WHEN MM IN ('11', '12', '01', '02') THEN 'W' WHEN MM IN ('06', '07', '08') THEN 'S' ELSE 'F' END AS APLCN_PTM_CD, MM, DD, HH, LAST_VALUE FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 1, 4) AS YYYY, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 5, 2) AS MM, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 7, 2) AS DD, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 9, 2) AS HH, LAST_VALUE FROM RDFSTAT01HH_TB WHERE ITEM_NM ='PWRER_USG_HH' AND #{from_year} || #{from_mon} <= SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 1, 6) AND SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 1, 6) <= #{to_year} || #{to_mon} ) H ) H LEFT JOIN UP_TBL U ON H.YYYY = U.CRTR_YR AND H.APLCN_PTM_CD = U.APLCN_PTM_CD AND H.HH = U.HH ORDER BY DATA_DT
